summary: Iteration 77 tested auto-compilation features: (1) GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns _auto_fields, _timeline, and auto-populated data from preventivo, (2) GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/fascicolo-completo-pdf?docs=X combines PDFs using pypdf, (3) POST/GET/PUT preventivi with giorni_consegna works correctly. All 18 backend tests passed. UI verified: Document cards show completion indicators (filled/total), cards with missing fields have amber border, 'Genera Fascicolo Tecnico Completo' button opens dialog with 6 checkboxes, SmartField shows AUTO/DA COMPILARE badges, Timeline produzione strip shows in Piano di Controllo edit dialog, Preventivo editor has 'Tempi di Consegna (giorni)' input field.

success_rate.frontend: Verified via Playwright - all features working

test_credentials: Test users created/cleaned during pytest run and UI tests
seed_data_creation: Test preventivi, commesse with fasi_produzione created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 adds: (1) Auto-compilation - _auto_fields list and auto-populated fields from preventivo (numero_disegno, ingegnere_disegno, classe_esecuzione) and commessa (numero, title, client_name), (2) Timeline produzione - _timeline array from fasi_produzione synced to Piano di Controllo dates, (3) Fascicolo Completo PDF - /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/fascicolo-completo-pdf?docs=dop,ce,piano,vt,registro,riesame combines selected PDFs using pypdf, (4) giorni_consegna field in preventivo. Frontend shows completion indicators on document cards (e.g., '8/16'), amber borders for incomplete docs, 'Da completare' hints, AUTO/DA COMPILARE badges on SmartField, timeline strip in Piano edit dialog.

preventivo_giorni_consegna_create.details: POST /api/preventivi with giorni_consegna=60 saves and returns correctly

fascicolo_auto_fields.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns _auto_fields list with disegno_numero, disegno_riferimento, redatto_da, etc.

fascicolo_timeline.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns _timeline array from fasi_produzione (taglio, foratura, assemblaggio, saldatura)

fascicolo_auto_populated_disegno.details: disegno_numero and disegno_riferimento auto-populated from preventivo.numero_disegno

fascicolo_completo_all_docs.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/fascicolo-completo-pdf returns combined PDF (default: all 6 docs)

fascicolo_completo_dop_ce.details: GET ...?docs=dop,ce combines only DOP and CE PDFs

fascicolo_completo_single_doc.details: GET ...?docs=piano generates single Piano di Controllo PDF

frontend_giorni_consegna_input.details: Preventivo editor shows 'Tempi di Consegna (giorni)' input field with data-testid='input-giorni-consegna'

frontend_document_cards_completion.details: Document cards show completion indicator (e.g., '8/16', '7/14') as badge

frontend_amber_border_incomplete.details: Cards with missing fields have 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50/30' styling

frontend_fascicolo_completo_dialog.details: 'Genera Fascicolo Tecnico Completo' button opens dialog with 6 checkboxes, completion %, Tutti/Nessuno buttons

frontend_smartfield_auto_badge.details: SmartField shows 'AUTO' badge (green) for auto-populated fields, 'DA COMPILARE' badge (amber) for empty required fields

frontend_timeline_in_piano_edit.details: Piano di Controllo edit dialog shows 'Stato Produzione (date auto-sincronizzate)' timeline strip with phase progress

frontend_timeline_produzione.details: Fascicolo Tecnico section shows Timeline Produzione strip with colored segments (green=completed, blue=in_corso, gray=da_fare)
